name: sigr
description: SIGR - Sistema Integral de Gestion de Restaurante (monorepo orquestador)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"

author: Juan Esteban Velez Vanegas
